title: Wenzhou, Zhejiang — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Wenzhou, Zhejiang: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Wenzhou is a city in Zhejiang with a population of 9,572,000. A coastal city in Zhejiang known for its entrepreneurial culture, shoe and lighter manufacturing, and scenic mountain coastline.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
